scripts.build: pnpm -w --filter @tang/shared build && pnpm -w --filter @tang/web build && pnpm -w --filter @tang/server build && pnpm -w --filter @tang/admin build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -w --filter @tang/shared typecheck && pnpm -w --filter @tang/web typecheck && pnpm -w --filter @tang/server typecheck && pnpm -w --filter @tang/admin typecheck
